title: Doctoral Programs

Doctoral Programs

Application Requirements and Required Documents

MENU

ALES score at least 55 points from relevant field.

Certificate in English Proficiency  (YDS 55, TOEFL-IBT 66, PTE 50)

Curriculum Vitae

Transcript

2 Reference Letters

Certified copies of B.A. and M.A. diplomas

3 headshots

Identity card

Interview

The bank receipt of 100.00 TL. fee (Turkey Vakıflar Bank TAO -

TR 45 00015 00158007299003625

)

The candidate with the highest score according to the average grades will be accepted.

M.A. GPA,

ALES,

English Proficiency
